ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complexes" (
  "complex_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological complex */,
  "uniprot_1" TEXT /* UniProt ID of the first subunit */,
  "uniprot_2" TEXT /* UniProt ID of the second subunit */,
  "uniprot_3" TEXT /* UniProt ID of the third subunit */,
  "uniprot_4" TEXT /* UniProt ID of the fourth subunit */,
  "transmembrane" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex has transmembrane proteins */,
  "peripheral" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex has peripheral proteins */,
  "secreted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex is secreted */,
  "secreted_desc" TEXT /* Description of secreted status */,
  "secreted_highlight" INTEGER /* Highlights related to secreted status */,
  "receptor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex acts as a receptor */,
  "receptor_desc" TEXT /* Description of receptor interaction */,
  "integrin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex contains integrin */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Indicates presence of other subunits */,
  "other_desc" TEXT /* Description of other subunits */,
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB identifier for complex structure */,
  "pdb_structure" TEXT /* PDB structure representation */,
  "stoichiometry" TEXT /* Stoichiometry of the complex */,
  "comments_complex" TEXT /* Comments about the biological complex */,
  "complex_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the complex */,
  "biological_role" TEXT /* Biological role of the complex */,
  "interaction_mechanism" TEXT /* Detailed interaction mechanism */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complex_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "uniprot_entries" (
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each UniProt entry */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene name corresponding to the protein */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the protein is derived */,
  "functionality" TEXT /* Functionality or role of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein in amino acids */,
  "modification_sites" TEXT /* Sites of post-translational modifications */,
  "references" TEXT /* References to literature or other resources */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uniprot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdb_structures" (
  "pdb_id" TEXT /* PDB identifier for the structural entry */,
  "structure_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the structure */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the structure in Angstroms */,
  "experimental_technique" TEXT /* Technique used for determination of the structure */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date the structure was released */,
  "resolution_method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the resolution */,
  "structure_type" TEXT /* Type of structure (e.g., X-ray, NMR) */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the experiment was conducted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "complex_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological complex being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the comment was added */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for nested comments */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is approved */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_complex_name FOREIGN KEY ("complex_name") REFERENCES complexes ("complex_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receptors" (
  "receptor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receptor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the receptor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the receptor functionality */,
  "binding_affinity" REAL /* Affinity of the receptor for its ligand */,
  "ligand_id" TEXT /* ID of the ligand that binds to the receptor */,
  "activation_pathway" TEXT /* Pathway involved in receptor activation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receptor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receptors_ligand_id FOREIGN KEY ("ligand_id") REFERENCES uniprot_entries ("uniprot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrins" (
  "integrin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integrin */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the integrin */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integrin functionality */,
  "binding_partner" TEXT /* ID of the binding partner */,
  "activation_state" TEXT /* Activation state of the integrin */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integrin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrins_binding_partner FOREIGN KEY ("binding_partner") REFERENCES uniprot_entries ("uniprot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complex_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complex type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the complex type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complex type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type ID for hierarchical types */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complex_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES complex_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membrane_localization" (
  "localization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the localization entry */,
  "complex_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological complex */,
  "is_transmembrane" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex is a transmembrane protein */,
  "is_peripheral" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex is a peripheral protein */,
  "is_secreted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex is secreted */,
  "localization_type" TEXT /* Type of localization */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("localization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_membrane_localization_complex_name FOREIGN KEY ("complex_name") REFERENCES complexes ("complex_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "stoichiometry" (
  "stoichiometry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stoichiometry entry */,
  "complex_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological complex */,
  "stoichiometry_details" TEXT /* Details about the stoichiometry */,
  "subunit_quantities" TEXT /* Quantities of each subunit in the complex */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Detailed interactions between subunits */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stoichiometry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stoichiometry_complex_name FOREIGN KEY ("complex_name") REFERENCES complexes ("complex_name")
)
